headline: 3 Reasons to Sell AIG and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the last six months, AIG’s shares have sunk to $79.39, producing a disappointing 5.9% loss - a stark contrast to the S&P 500’s 8.4% gain. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
